CarrSoln.raw:
uint8 CARRIER_SOLUTION_NO_CARRIER_RANGE_SOLUTION = 0
uint8 CARRIER_SOLUTION_PHASE_WITH_FLOATING_AMBIGUITIES = 1
uint8 CARRIER_SOLUTION_PHASE_WITH_FIXED_AMBIGUITIES = 2
uint8 status         # Carrier phase solution status

GpsFix.raw:
uint8 GPS_NO_FIX = 0
uint8 GPS_DEAD_RECKONING_ONLY = 1
uint8 GPS_FIX_2D = 2
uint8 GPS_FIX_3D = 3
uint8 GPS_PLUS_DEAD_RECKONING = 4 
uint8 GPS_TIME_ONLY = 5
uint8 fix_type         # gps fix type

MapMatching.raw:
uint8 MAP_MATCHING_NONE = 0
uint8 MAP_MATCHING_VALID_NOT_USED = 1
uint8 MAP_MATCHING_VALID_AND_USED = 2
uint8 MAP_MATCHING_VALID_DEAD_RECKONING = 3
uint8 status    # map matching status

PSMPVT.raw:
# Power Save Mode for PVT
uint8 PSM_STATE_NOT_ACTIVE = 0
uint8 PSM_STATE_ENABLED = 1
uint8 PSM_STATE_ACQUISITION = 2
uint8 PSM_STATE_TRACKING = 3
uint8 PSM_STATE_POWER_OPTIMIZED_TRACKING = 4
uint8 PSM_STATE_INACTIVE = 5
uint8 state       # power save mode state

PSMStatus.raw:
# Power Save Mode for Status
uint8 PSM_STATE_ACQUISITION = 0
uint8 PSM_STATE_TRACKING = 1
uint8 PSM_STATE_POWER_OPTIMIZED_TRACKING = 2
uint8 PSM_STATE_INACTIVE = 3
uint8 state       # power save mode state

SpoofDet.raw:
uint8 SPOOF_DET_UNKNOWN = 0
uint8 SPOOF_DET_NO_SPOOFING = 1
uint8 SPOOF_DET_SPOOFING = 2
uint8 SPOOF_DET_MULTIPLE_SPOOFING = 3
uint8 state   # spoofing det state

UBXNavClock.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-CLOCK (0x01 0x22) record clock solution
UBXNavClock.raw:
# this message contains a UBX-NAV-CLOCK (0x01 0x22) record clock solution
std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

uint32 itow           #  ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch
int32 clk_b           # ns - Clock bias
int32 clk_d           # ns/s - Clock drift
uint32 t_acc          # ns - Time accuracy estimate
uint32 f_acc          # ps/s - Frequency accuracy estimate

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

UBXNavCov.description: This message contains a UBX-NAV-COV (0x01 0x36) record clock solution
UBXNavCov.raw:
# This message contains a UBX-NAV-COV (0x01 0x36) record clock solution
#
# It outputs the covariance matrices for the position and velocity
# solutions in the topocentric coordinate system defined as the local-level North
# (N), East (E), Down (D) frame. As the covariance matrices are symmetric, only
# the upper triangular part is output.
std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

uint32 itow           #  ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch
uint8 version         # message version (0x00 for this version)
bool pos_cor_valid    # position covariance matrix validity flag
bool vel_cor_valid    # velocity covariance matrix validity flag
float32 pos_cov_nn    # m^2 - Position covariance matric value p_NN
float32 pos_cov_ne    # m^2 - Position covariance matric value p_NE
float32 pos_cov_nd    # m^2 - Position covariance matric value p_ND
float32 pos_cov_ee    # m^2 - Position covariance matric value p_EE
float32 pos_cov_ed    # m^2 - Position covariance matric value p_ED
float32 pos_cov_dd    # m^2 - Position covariance matric value p_DD
float32 vel_cov_nn    # m^2/s^2 - Velocity covariance matric value v_NN
float32 vel_cov_ne    # m^2/s^2 - Velocity covariance matric value v_NE
float32 vel_cov_nd    # m^2/s^2 - Velocity covariance matric value v_ND
float32 vel_cov_ee    # m^2/s^2 - Velocity covariance matric value v_EE
float32 vel_cov_ed    # m^2/s^2 - Velocity covariance matric value v_ED
float32 vel_cov_dd    # m^2/s^2 - Velocity covariance matric value v_DD

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

fields.name: pos_cov_nn
fields.comment: m^2 - Position covariance matric value p_NN

fields.name: pos_cov_ne
fields.comment: m^2 - Position covariance matric value p_NE

fields.name: pos_cov_nd
fields.comment: m^2 - Position covariance matric value p_ND

fields.name: pos_cov_ee
fields.comment: m^2 - Position covariance matric value p_EE

fields.name: pos_cov_ed
fields.comment: m^2 - Position covariance matric value p_ED

fields.name: pos_cov_dd
fields.comment: m^2 - Position covariance matric value p_DD

fields.name: vel_cov_nn
fields.comment: m^2/s^2 - Velocity covariance matric value v_NN

fields.name: vel_cov_ne
fields.comment: m^2/s^2 - Velocity covariance matric value v_NE

fields.name: vel_cov_nd
fields.comment: m^2/s^2 - Velocity covariance matric value v_ND

fields.name: vel_cov_ee
fields.comment: m^2/s^2 - Velocity covariance matric value v_EE

fields.name: vel_cov_ed
fields.comment: m^2/s^2 - Velocity covariance matric value v_ED

fields.name: vel_cov_dd
fields.comment: m^2/s^2 - Velocity covariance matric value v_DD

UBXNavDOP.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-DOP (0x01 0x04) record dilution of precision
UBXNavDOP.raw:
# this message contains a UBX-NAV-DOP (0x01 0x04) record dilution of precision
std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

uint32 itow           # ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch
uint32 g_dop          # 0.01 - Geometric DOP 
uint32 p_dop          # 0.01 - Position DOP 
uint32 t_dop          # 0.01 - Time DOP 
uint32 v_dop          # 0.01 - Vertical DOP 
uint32 h_dop          # 0.01 - Horizontal DOP 
uint32 n_dop          # 0.01 - Northing DOP 
uint32 e_dop          # 0.01 - Easting DOP

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

UBXNavEOE.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-EOE (0x01 0x61) record End of Epoch
UBXNavEOE.raw:
# this message contains a UBX-NAV-EOE (0x01 0x61) record End of Epoch
std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

uint32 itow           #  ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

UBXNavHPPosECEF.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-HPPOSECEF (0x01 0x13) record
UBXNavHPPosECEF.raw:
# this message contains a UBX-NAV-HPPOSECEF (0x01 0x13) record 
std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

uint8 version         # message version
uint32 itow           # ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch
int32 ecef_x          # cm - ECEF X coordinate
int32 ecef_y          # cm - ECEF Y coordinate
int32 ecef_z          # cm - ECEF Z coordinate
# HPs must be in the range of -99..+99. Precise coordinate in cm = ecef_? + (ecef_?_hp * 1e-2)
int8 ecef_x_hp        # mm scale 0.1 - high precision ECEF X coordinate
int8 ecef_y_hp        # mm scale 0.1 - high precision ECEF Y coordinate
int8 ecef_z_hp        # mm scale 0.1 - high precision ECEF Z coordinate
bool invalid_ecef_x
bool invalid_ecef_y
bool invalid_ecef_z
bool invalid_ecef_x_hp
bool invalid_ecef_y_hp
bool invalid_ecef_z_hp
uint32 p_acc          # mm scale 0.1 - position accuracy estimate

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

fields.name: ecef_x_hp
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - high precision ECEF X coordinate

fields.name: ecef_y_hp
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - high precision ECEF Y coordinate

fields.name: ecef_z_hp
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - high precision ECEF Z coordinate

UBXNavHPPosLLH.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-HPPOSLLH (0x01 0x14) record
UBXNavHPPosLLH.raw:
# this message contains a UBX-NAV-HPPOSLLH (0x01 0x14) record 
std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

uint8 version         # message version
bool invalid_lon        
bool invalid_lat
bool invalid_height
bool invalid_hmsl     # invalid height above mean sea level
bool invalid_lon_hp
bool invalid_lat_hp
bool invalid_height_hp
bool invalid_hmsl_hp  # invalid height above mean sea level
uint32 itow           # ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch
int32 lon             # deg scale 1e-7 - longitude
int32 lat             # deg scale 1e-7 - latitude
int32 height          # mm - height above ellipsoid
int32 hmsl            # mm - height above mean sea level
int8 lon_hp           # deg scale 1e-9 - Precision longitude in deg * 1e-7 = lon +(lonHp * 1e-2)
int8 lat_hp           # deg scale 1e-9 - Precise latitude in deg  *  1e-7  =  lat  +(latHp * 1e-2) 
int8 height_hp        # mm scale 0.1 - Precise height in mm = height + (heightHp * 0.1)
int8 hmsl_hp          # mm scale 0.1 - Precise height in mm =hMSL + (hMSLHp * 0.1)
uint32 h_acc          # mm scale 0.1 - horizontal accuracy estimate
uint32 v_acc          # mm scale 0.1 - vertical accuracy estimate

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: invalid_hmsl
fields.comment: invalid height above mean sea level

fields.name: invalid_hmsl_hp
fields.comment: invalid height above mean sea level

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

fields.name: hmsl
fields.comment: mm - height above mean sea level

fields.name: lon_hp
fields.comment: deg scale 1e-9 - Precision longitude in deg * 1e-7 = lon +(lonHp * 1e-2)

fields.name: lat_hp
fields.comment: deg scale 1e-9 - Precise latitude in deg  *  1e-7  =  lat  +(latHp * 1e-2)

fields.name: height_hp
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - Precise height in mm = height + (heightHp * 0.1)

fields.name: hmsl_hp
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - Precise height in mm =hMSL + (hMSLHp * 0.1)

UBXNavOdo.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-ODO (0x01 0x09) record Odometer solution
UBXNavOdo.raw:
# this message contains a UBX-NAV-ODO (0x01 0x09) record Odometer solution
std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

uint8 version         # message version
uint32 itow           # ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch
uint32 distance       # m - ground distance since last reset
uint32 total_distance # m - total comulative ground distance (since last cold start)
uint32 distance_std   # m - ground distance accuracy (1-sigma)

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

fields.name: distance
fields.comment: m - ground distance since last reset

fields.name: total_distance
fields.comment: m - total comulative ground distance (since last cold start)

UBXNavPVT.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-PVT (0x01 0x07) record
UBXNavPVT.raw:
# this message contains a UBX-NAV-PVT (0x01 0x07) record
# Navigation position velocity time solution
std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

uint32 itow           # ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch
uint16 year           # y - year utc
uint8 month           # month - month utc
uint8 day             # d -day utc
uint8 hour            # h - hour utc
uint8 min             # min - min utc
uint8 sec             # s - sec utc
bool valid_date       # valid UTC date
bool valid_time       # valid UTC time of day
bool fully_resolved   # UTC Time of day has been fully resolved (no seconds uncertainty)
bool valid_mag        # valid magnetic declination
uint32 t_acc          # ns - time accuracy estimate (utc)
int32 nano            # ns - fraction of second, range -1e9 to 1e9 (utc)
GpsFix gps_fix        # GNSSFix type
bool gnss_fix_ok      # valid fix (ie within DOP & accruacy masks)
bool diff_soln        # differential corrections were applied
PSMPVT psm            # power save mode state
bool head_veh_valid   # heading of vehicle is valid, only set if the receiver is in sensor fusion mode
CarrSoln carr_soln    # carrier phase rnage solution status
bool confirmed_avail  # information about UTC date and time of day validity confirmation is available 
bool confirmed_date   # UTC Date validity could be confirmed
bool confirmed_time   # UTC Time of Day validity could be confirmed
uint8 num_sv          # Number of satellites used in Nav Solution
int32 lon             # deg scale ie-7 - longitude
int32 lat             # deg scale ie-7 - latitude
int32 height          # mm - Height above ellipsoid
int32 hmsl            # mm - Height above mean sea level
uint32 h_acc          # mm - Horizontal accuracy estimate 
uint32 v_acc          # mm - Vertical accuracy estimate 
int32 vel_n           # mm/s - NED north velocity
int32 vel_e           # mm/s - NED east velocity
int32 vel_d           # mm/s - NED down velocity
int32 g_speed         # mm/s - ground speed (2-D)
int32 head_mot        # deg scale ie-5 - heading of motion (2-D) 
uint32 s_acc          # mm/s - speed accuracy estimate
uint32 head_acc       # deg scale ie-5 - heading accruracy estime (both motion and vehicle)
uint16 p_dop          # scale 0.01 - Position DOP
bool invalid_llh      # invalid lon, lat, height, hmsl
int32 head_veh        # deg scale 1e-5 - Heading of vehicle (2-D), this is only valid when head_veh_valid is set, 
                      # otherwise the output is set to the heading of motion
int16 mag_dec         # deg scale 1e-2 - Magnetic declination. Only supported in ADR 4.10 and later
uint16 mag_acc        # deg scale ie-2 - Mangetic declination accuracy. Only supported in ADR 4.10 and later

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

fields.name: fully_resolved
fields.comment: UTC Time of day has been fully resolved (no seconds uncertainty)

fields.name: nano
fields.comment: ns - fraction of second, range -1e9 to 1e9 (utc)

fields.name: gnss_fix_ok
fields.comment: valid fix (ie within DOP & accruacy masks)

fields.name: head_veh_valid
fields.comment: heading of vehicle is valid, only set if the receiver is in sensor fusion mode

fields.name: confirmed_avail
fields.comment: information about UTC date and time of day validity confirmation is available

fields.name: confirmed_date
fields.comment: UTC Date validity could be confirmed

fields.name: confirmed_time
fields.comment: UTC Time of Day validity could be confirmed

fields.name: num_sv
fields.comment: Number of satellites used in Nav Solution

fields.name: hmsl
fields.comment: mm - Height above mean sea level

fields.name: head_mot
fields.comment: deg scale ie-5 - heading of motion (2-D)

fields.name: head_acc
fields.comment: deg scale ie-5 - heading accruracy estime (both motion and vehicle)

fields.name: head_veh
fields.comment: deg scale 1e-5 - Heading of vehicle (2-D), this is only valid when head_veh_valid is set,

fields.name: mag_dec
fields.comment: deg scale 1e-2 - Magnetic declination. Only supported in ADR 4.10 and later

fields.name: mag_acc
fields.comment: deg scale ie-2 - Mangetic declination accuracy. Only supported in ADR 4.10 and later

UBXNavPosECEF.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-POSECEF (0x01 0x01) record
UBXNavPosECEF.raw:
# this message contains a UBX-NAV-POSECEF (0x01 0x01) record 
std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

uint32 itow           # ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch
int32 ecef_x          # cm - ECEF X coordinate
int32 ecef_y          # cm - ECEF Y coordinate
int32 ecef_z          # cm - ECEF Z coordinate
uint32 p_acc          # cm - position accuracy estimate

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

UBXNavPosLLH.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-POSLLH (0x01 0x02) record
UBXNavPosLLH.raw:
# this message contains a UBX-NAV-POSLLH (0x01 0x02) record 
std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

uint32 itow           # ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch
int32 lon             # deg scale 1e-7 - longitude
int32 lat             # deg scale 1e-7 - latitude
int32 height          # mm - height above ellipsoid
int32 hmsl            # mm - height above mean sea level
uint32 h_acc          # mm - horizontal accuracy estimate

fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

UBXNavRelPosNED.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-ODO (0x01 0x3c) record
UBXNavRelPosNED.raw:
# this message contains a UBX-NAV-ODO (0x01 0x3c) record 
# Relative position information in NED frame
std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

uint8 version             # message version
uint16 ref_station_id     # reference station ID. Must be in the range 0..4096
uint32 itow               # ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch
int32 rel_pos_n           # cm - North component of relative position vector 
int32 rel_pos_e           # cm - East component of relative position vector 
int32 rel_pos_d           # cm - Down component of relative position vector 
int32 rel_pos_length      # cm - Length of the relative position vector
int32 rel_pos_heading     # deg scale 1e-5 - Heading of the relative position vector
int8 rel_pos_hp_n         # mm scale 0.1 - full HP North is given by relPosN + (relPosHPN * 1e-2) 
int8 rel_pos_hp_e         # mm scale 0.1 - full HP East is given by relPosE + (relPosHPE * 1e-2) 
int8 rel_pos_hp_d         # mm scale 0.1 - full HP Down is given by relPosD + (relPosHPD * 1e-2) 
int8 rel_pos_hp_length    # mm scale 0.1 - full HP length is given by relPosLength + (relPosHPLength * 1e-2) 
uint32 acc_n              # mm scale 0.1 - Accuracy of relative position North Component
uint32 acc_e              # mm scale 0.1 - Accuracy of relative position East Component
uint32 acc_d              # mm scale 0.1 - Accuracy of relative position Down Component
uint32 acc_length         # mm scale 0.1 - Accuracy of length of the relative position vector
uint32 acc_heading        # deg scale 1e-5 - Accuracy of heading of the relative position vector
bool gnss_fix_ok          # A valid fix (i.e within DOP & accuracy masks) 
bool diff_soln            # differential corrections were applied
bool rel_pos_valid        # relative position components and accuracies are valid and, in moving base mode only, if baseline is valid
CarrSoln carr_soln        # carrier phase range solution
bool is_moving            # if the received is operating in moving base mode
bool ref_pos_miss         # if extrapolated reference position was used to compute moving base solution this epoch. 
bool ref_obs_miss         # if extrapolated reference observations were used to compute moving base solution this epoch. 
bool rel_pos_heading_valid # relPosHeading is valid
bool rel_pos_normalized   # components of the relative position vector (including the high-precision parts) are normalized

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: ref_station_id
fields.comment: reference station ID. Must be in the range 0..4096

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

fields.name: rel_pos_n
fields.comment: cm - North component of relative position vector

fields.name: rel_pos_e
fields.comment: cm - East component of relative position vector

fields.name: rel_pos_d
fields.comment: cm - Down component of relative position vector

fields.name: rel_pos_length
fields.comment: cm - Length of the relative position vector

fields.name: rel_pos_heading
fields.comment: deg scale 1e-5 - Heading of the relative position vector

fields.name: rel_pos_hp_n
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - full HP North is given by relPosN + (relPosHPN * 1e-2)

fields.name: rel_pos_hp_e
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - full HP East is given by relPosE + (relPosHPE * 1e-2)

fields.name: rel_pos_hp_d
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - full HP Down is given by relPosD + (relPosHPD * 1e-2)

fields.name: rel_pos_hp_length
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - full HP length is given by relPosLength + (relPosHPLength * 1e-2)

fields.name: acc_n
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - Accuracy of relative position North Component

fields.name: acc_e
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - Accuracy of relative position East Component

fields.name: acc_d
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - Accuracy of relative position Down Component

fields.name: acc_length
fields.comment: mm scale 0.1 - Accuracy of length of the relative position vector

fields.name: acc_heading
fields.comment: deg scale 1e-5 - Accuracy of heading of the relative position vector

fields.name: gnss_fix_ok
fields.comment: A valid fix (i.e within DOP & accuracy masks)

fields.name: rel_pos_valid
fields.comment: relative position components and accuracies are valid and, in moving base mode only, if baseline is valid

fields.name: is_moving
fields.comment: if the received is operating in moving base mode

fields.name: ref_pos_miss
fields.comment: if extrapolated reference position was used to compute moving base solution this epoch.

fields.name: ref_obs_miss
fields.comment: if extrapolated reference observations were used to compute moving base solution this epoch.

fields.name: rel_pos_normalized
fields.comment: components of the relative position vector (including the high-precision parts) are normalized

UBXNavStatus.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-STATUS (0x01 0x03) record
UBXNavStatus.raw:
# this message contains a UBX-NAV-STATUS (0x01 0x03) record
std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

uint32 itow           #  ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

GpsFix gps_fix         # gps fix

# navigation status flags
bool gps_fix_ok       # position and velocity valid and within DOP and ACCMasks
bool diff_soln        # differential corrections were applied
bool wkn_set          # week number valid
bool tow_set          # time of week valid

# navigation fix status information 
bool diff_corr        # differential corrections available 
bool carr_soln_valid  # valid carrSoln

MapMatching map_matching    # map matching status

# further information about navigation output
PSMStatus psm       # power save mode state
SpoofDet spoof_det
CarrSoln carr_soln         # Carrier phase solution status 

uint32 ttff             # time to first fix (milliseond time tag)
uint32 msss             # milliseconds since Startup/Reset

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

fields.name: gps_fix_ok
fields.comment: position and velocity valid and within DOP and ACCMasks

fields.name: ttff
fields.comment: time to first fix (milliseond time tag)

UBXNavTimeUTC.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-EOE (0x01 0x21) record UTC Time Solution
UBXNavTimeUTC.raw:

int16 year            # y - year utc
int8 month            # month - month utc
int8 day              # d -day utc
int8 hour             # h - hour utc
int8 min              # min - min utc
int8 sec              # s - sec utc
bool valid_tow        # valid Time of Week
bool valid_wkn        # valid Week Number
bool valid_utc        # valid UTC time
UtcStd utc_std        # UTC standard identifier

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

fields.name: nano
fields.comment: ns - fraction of second, range -1e9 to 1e9 (utc)

UBXNavVelECEF.raw:

UBXNavVelNED.description: this message contains a UBX-NAV-VELNED (0x01 0x12) record
UBXNavVelNED.raw:
# this message contains a UBX-NAV-VELNED (0x01 0x12) record

std_msgs/Header header # Header timestamp should be acquisition time

int32 vel_d            # cm/s - NED down velocity

int32 heading          # deg scale ie-5 - heading of motion (2-D) 
uint32 s_acc           # cm/s - speed accuracy estimate
uint32 c_acc           # deg scale ie-5 - course/heading accruracy estime (both motion and vehicle)

fields.name: header
fields.comment: Header timestamp should be acquisition time

fields.name: itow
fields.comment: ms - GPS Time of week of the navigation epoch

fields.name: heading
fields.comment: deg scale ie-5 - heading of motion (2-D)

fields.name: c_acc
fields.comment: deg scale ie-5 - course/heading accruracy estime (both motion and vehicle)

UtcStd.raw:
uint8 NOT_AVAILABLE = 0
uint8 CRL = 1            # Communications Research Labratory (CRL),Tokyo, Japan
uint8 NIST = 2           # National Institute of Standards andTechnology (NIST)
uint8 USNO = 3           # U.S. Naval Observatory (USNO)
uint8 BIPM = 4           # International Bureau of Weights andMeasures (BIPM)
uint8 EURO = 5           # European laboratories
uint8 SU = 6             # Former Soviet Union
uint8 NTSC = 7           # National Time Service Center (NTSC) China
uint8 UTC_UNKNOWN = 15   # Unknown time source
uint8 id                 # uc standard id
